finding: RF global ρ=0.4060 vs XGB ρ=0.3904 — RF wins with default params
impact: RF chosen for production but XGB untested with tuning

finding: Per-type split: mini_tour ρ=0.52, grand_tour ρ=0.59, classic ρ=0.31
impact: Classics excluded from ML; stage races are the target

finding: Continuous profile_score (0-483) did not improve ρ over categorical P1-P5
impact: V5 features abandoned; v4b (49 features) is production standard

finding: RF params fixed: n_estimators=500, max_depth=14, min_samples_leaf=5 — no systematic tuning
impact: Hyperparameter optimization is a low-hanging fruit

finding: Feature importance: stage_pts_12m (0.14), win_rate (0.07), pts_total_12m (0.05) dominate
impact: Top 3 features capture ~26% of importance; long tail may be noise

finding: Evaluation is single-split (train 2023-24, test 2025) — no CV
impact: ρ estimates may be noisy; need temporal CV for reliable comparison

finding: Production v4b benchmarks: mini tour ρ=0.53, grand tour ρ=0.60
Rider profile × race profile features exist separately but no explicit interaction terms
impact: Tree models must learn interactions implicitly; explicit cross-terms may help

finding: Game scoring tables verified: stage (40/25/22), GC GT (150/125/100), daily GC (15/10/8), mountain passes HC (12/8/6), sprints (6/4/2)
impact: Our points.py tables match for captured categories but we miss daily GC + passes + sprints

finding: DB has only 4 categories: stage gc mountain sprint — all final classifications, no daily data
impact: ~35% of game scoring is missing from training target

finding: Stage page has 6 hidden tabs: GC daily, points/sprints, KOM/passes, youth, teams — all in one page
impact: No extra HTTP requests needed; just parse hidden div.resTab tabs

finding: Individual mountain pass headings contain category: 'KOM Sprint (HC) Plateau de Beille (197.7 km)', 'KOM Sprint (1) Col de Peyresourde (7 km)'
impact: Can parse climb category (HC/1/2/3/4) and name from heading text

finding: Sprint intermediate heading: 'Sprint | Marignac (37 km)' with rider positions and points
impact: Can extract sprint location and positions from heading + table

finding: KOM tab has 'Today' column showing points gained that day per rider, plus cumulative 'Pnt' column
impact: Today column directly gives daily points for regularidad/KOM standings
